## Exploration: run

Found 9 symbols across 2 files.

### Source Code

> The code below is the **verbatim, current on-disk source** of these files — re-read from disk on this call and line-numbered, byte-for-byte identical to what the Read tool returns. It is NOT a summary, outline, or stale cache. Treat each block as a Read you have already performed: do not Read a file shown here.

#### app.ex — run(function), App(module)

```elixir
1	# Application module exercising alias + cross-module Module.func calls.
2	
3	defmodule App do
4	  alias Circle, as: C
5	
6	  def run(radius) do
7	    shape = %C{radius: radius, name: "c"}
8	    a = Circle.area(shape)
9	    name = C.label(shape)
10	    {a, name}
11	  end
12	end
```

#### shapes.ex — area(function), label(function), Circle(module), Circle(struct), scale(function), +1 more

```elixir
1	# Domain protocol + a concrete shape for the elixir-small fixture.
2	
3	@pi 3.14159
4	
5	defprotocol Shape do
6	  @doc "Return the area of a shape."
7	  def area(shape)
8	end
9	
10	defmodule Circle do
11	  defstruct [:radius, :name]
12	
13	  def area(%Circle{radius: r}) do
14	    r * r * 3
15	  end
16	
17	  def label(circle) do
18	    circle.name
19	  end
20	
21	  defp scale(r), do: r * 2
22	end
23	
24	defimpl Shape, for: Circle do
25	  def area(circle), do: Circle.area(circle)
26	end
```
